name: io.github.jfarnsworth/workflow-universe-server
title: Workflow — Universe Server (Workflow Builder)
description: Workflow / Workflow Builder — build, run, and steer custom AI workflows as graphs of agent nodes inside shared universes. Ships with a long-form fiction domain (autonomous Author daemons writing novels) and is extensible to other domains. Also known as: workflow builder, custom AI builder, universe builder, agent workflow platform.
